post.text_content:
🚀 We're Hiring | Associate – Master Data Management 🚀
📍 Experience: 0–2 Years
🎓 Qualification: Graduate
🗣️ English: Intermediate to Advanced

Key Skills Required:
✅ Master Data Management
✅ SAP / ERP (Basic Knowledge)
✅ MS Excel (VLOOKUP, Formulas, Functions)
✅ SQL
✅ Python (Basic)
✅ Data Validation & Data Cleansing
✅ MS Outlook & Microsoft Teams
✅ Good Typing Speed
✅ Strong Communication Skills

Job Responsibilities:
Process Customer/Vendor Master Data requests (Create, Update, Block, Archive).
Maintain and update master data in SAP/ERP systems.
Perform data cleansing and enrichment activities.
Ensure data accuracy and meet defined KPIs.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support business operations.
📩 Interested candidates can share their updated resume at [ankita@frontier.in] or DM me for more details.
#Hiring #MasterDataManagement #SAP #ERP #SQL #Python #Excel #DataAnalyst #DataManagement #FreshersJobs #HiringNow #CareerOpportunity Frontier Business systems Pvt. ltd.Rohini GAishwarya M.
